pages.title: Mechanical Engineer
pages.text: Discipline 2 of $(l:classes/engineer)Engineer$(/l). The Create machine tier. Twenty-two items — nine core tools and thirteen mid-tier machines.

pages.title: Core tools
pages.text: $(bold)Wrench, Goggles, Schematic Table, Belt Connector, Empty Blaze Burner.$(/) The basics every Create build needs.$(br2)$(bold)Mechanical Saw, Deployer, Mechanical Arm.$(/) Automation primitives.$(br2)$(bold)Mechanical Drill.$(/) The Aero interlock part.

pages.title: Mid-tier machines
pages.text: $(bold)Mechanical Press$(/) — the Electrical interlock hub.$(br2)$(bold)Mechanical Mixer, Millstone, Crushing Wheel.$(/) Processing.$(br2)$(bold)Mechanical Piston, Encased Fan, Gearbox, Clutch, Gearshift.$(/) Kinetics.$(br2)$(bold)Water Wheel, Hand Crank, Basin, Depot.$(/) Generators and stations.

pages.title: Hub role
pages.text: Self-contained — you do not need the other two disciplines.$(br2)But Aero needs a Mechanical Drill for its top-tier engines and drills, and Electrical needs a Mechanical Press for its top-tier storage. Mech is the most-asked-for engineer on any server.$(br2)Matching trader: the Mechanist.
